legacy_entry_points.v1_decision_layer: swm/decision/* — operates on v1 StructuralModel specs; zero imports of world_model_v2 (verified by grep)

worldstate_lineage.clone: WorldState.clone(branch_id=) at state.py:216 records parent_version — counterfactual branch lineage
worldstate_lineage.branch: WorldBranch (state.py:229) carries weight + [StateDelta] log + terminal flag

phase_supervisor_behavior.invocation: unified_runtime.py:309-334 — assess() + finalize() every run; manifest DERIVED from records; blocked relevant phase lowers support_grade

state_delta_protocol.endogenous_chains: delta.follow_up_events validated against event registry + horizon-capped queue at rollout.py:60-73

event_queue.event: Event(ts, seq, etype, participants, payload, visibility, source, preconditions) — etype must be registered (events.py:60)
event_queue.hazards: StochasticHazard exponential inter-arrival, re-armed inside next_event (events.py:109)
event_queue.builder: materialize.queue_builder_from_plan (materialize.py:140) — fresh queue per branch from plan.scheduled_events + stochastic_hazards

posterior_particles.initial_state: init_state.py::InitialStateModel.sample_particles(n, seed) — random.Random(seed), latents in declaration order, observed fields never perturbed
posterior_particles.outcome_rate: phase3_posterior.infer_posterior -> plan.posterior_rate_particles [(rate, weight)]; injected at materialize._inject_posterior_rate (materialize.py:195)
posterior_particles.structural: plan.structural_posterior; stratified into particles at materialize._run_with_hypotheses (materialize.py:261)

rng_flow.per_branch: RolloutEngine.run_branch: rng = random.Random(seed) at rollout.py:30; branch seed = seed*7919 + particle_index (rollout.py:103,124)
rng_flow.sub_streams_existing: phase_consumers._branch_rng(world, salt)=sha256(branch_id|salt); registry hazard families hash((branch_id, var))
rng_flow.limitation_for_decisions: ONE sequential Random per branch: an intervention that inserts/removes an event shifts every subsequent draw — unrelated exogenous shocks desynchronize across counterfactual arms (violates Part 8 stream-partitioning). Initial hazard arrivals ARE matched (queue_builder keys rng on the particle part of branch_id).

phase11_recompilation.triggers: external RecompileObservations only (surprise/ESS/trigger families); simulation-internal representable events execute normally and never recompile
phase11_recompilation.interface: unified_runtime._run_recompilation (unified_runtime.py:387); adopted revisions mutate the plan in-place; max_recompiles=2, oscillation guard

terminal_readout.projection: contracts.OutcomeContract.project (contracts.py:65) — frequencies over weighted terminal branches; unresolved_share for out-of-option worlds; never an LLM number
terminal_readout.event_time: event_time.py converts when/categorical/binary-deadline questions to first-passage readouts
terminal_readout.result: result.py::SimulationResult — raw + calibrated distributions, uncertainty_decomposition, support_grade, provenance

calibration_contract.serving: phase12_serve.calibrated_result — never overwrites raw; calibrator registry identity/platt/beta/isotonic (calibration.py:214)
calibration_contract.fingerprint: runtime_fingerprint.py::runtime_fingerprint() — calibrators fit under a different fingerprint are diagnostic_only

intervention_seams.typed_primitive: contracts.Intervention(intervention_id, description, apply(world,queue), kind) + contracts.ActionSpace (auto 'none' baseline) + contracts.UtilityFunction
intervention_seams.matched_evaluator: rollout.evaluate_interventions — clones sampled worlds per arm, matched per-particle seeds, paired p_best/expected_regret
intervention_seams.simulate_world_intervention_param: TEXT ONLY — rendered into the compiler prompt (compiler.py:61,355) and gates recommendation_status (pipeline.py:29-36); it is NOT mechanically injected into any rollout

actor_action_seams.operator_contract: transitions.TransitionOperator propose->validate->apply; institutional validation inside validate
decision_operators: AgentDecisionOperator (LLM proposes among typed institution-validated actions; probability-minting disabled on production path)
phase4_execution.production_actor_policy (posterior -> ActorView -> ActionSpace -> feasibility -> calibrated action posterior)
actor_action_seams.observable_view: transitions.observable_view — actors read only what they can know

current_limitations_for_decision_optimiz: simulate_world's intervention parameter is prompt text, not a mechanical do() — no production path runs matched counterfactuals
single sequential RNG per branch desynchronizes unrelated shocks when an arm inserts events (no stream partitioning)
no DecisionProblem contract: no authority/resources/constraints/stakeholder utility/risk tolerance representation
no feasibility/authorization engine for interventions — evaluate_interventions simulates whatever apply() does
no action ontology or affordance-based generation; action spaces are hand-built per experiment
reporting is p_best/expected_regret/downside_p10 only — no CVaR, P(harm), constraint violations, structural-hypothesis sensitivity, VOI
no sequential/contingent policies through the v2 funnel (decision/policy.py is v1-only)
no off-policy evaluation (IPS/DR) and no real-intervention benchmark beyond the single Upworthy surface-model round (negligible lift, honestly recorded in docs/WMV2_BEST_ACTION_EVALUATION.md)
structural-hypothesis stratification exists for forecasts (materialize._run_with_hypotheses) but evaluate_interventions ignores structural_hypotheses

phase13_integration_decision.package: swm/world_model_v2/phase13/ — extends canonical contracts; all interventions enter via contracts.Intervention -> canonical EventQueue events handled by a registered TransitionOperator; rollouts run through RolloutEngine subclass with stream-partitioned CRN; no fork of the simulator; no direct terminal mutation
phase13_integration_decision.do_not_modify: branch agent-engine-on-main untouched; existing evaluate_interventions kept working
